# **NON-UNION CASTING CALL**

This commercial is for Ford and films in Calgary** all expenses paid.**

You must be available **June 15-22** for ALL DATES. If not available to travel to Calgary for these dates do no submit.

Auditions will be via self tape you do at home. Callbacks will be done via zoom. Must not be exclusively repped by a commercial agent to apply.

**Pay: **

$300 per travel day (2)

$300 per down day (day not working)

$600 per day on set 

$6000 buyout after commercial is edited and airing

Flights, 4-5* hotel and expenses covered.

IF local to calgary no hotel provided. 

**We are seeking:**

**Men:**
* Real Carpenters (30s-40s)
* Real farmers (30s-40s)
* Real boat builders (20s-40s)
* Real Industrial Builders (30s-50s)
* Real Older Farmer (60s-70s)
* Real Younger Farmer (young 20s)

**Women:**
* Real boat builders (20s-40s)

**If you are available and fit the specs abov**e please send to [lynda@gotalentagency.com](mailto:lynda@gotalentagency.com) ASAP:

1. First/Last name
2. Email
3. Phone
4. ONE good photo (head/shoulders) taken recently
5. Which category you fall into and a brief description of your experience

[www.gotalentagency.com](www.gotalentagency.com)

items.text:
Auditions for Around the World in 80 Days at Cabrillo Playhouse in San Clemente
AUDITIONS!

Around the World in 80 Days
Adapted by Mark Brown. From the novel by Jules Verne.
Directed by Frank Minano

Auditions:
Sunday, May 24 @ 6:00pm

Callbacks: by invitation Tuesday, June 2 @ 7:00pm

Synopsis:
Join fearless adventurer Phileas Fogg and his faithful manservant as they race to beat the clock! Phileas Fogg has agreed to an outrageous wager that puts his fortune and his life at risk. With his resourceful servant Passepartout, Fogg sets out to circle the globe in an unheard-of 80 days. But his every step is dogged by a detective who thinks he’s a robber on the run. Danger, romance, and comic surprises abound in this whirlwind of a show as 6 actors portraying 39 characters traverse seven continents in one of the great adventures of all time.

Please be prepared to read from sides provided
Bring a headshot and resume and be ready to list ALL conflicts.
Cold reading sides will also be provided at auditions.
Performances: August 21 to September 13, 2026

Thurs–Sat at 7:30pm
Sundays at 2:00pm

Saturday matinees August 29 and September 12 at 2:00pm
Rehearsals at Cabrillo Playhouse

@7pm
June 9,16, 23, 30
July 7, 9, 21, 22, 28, 29
Aug 4, 6, 8, 10, 12, 13
Tech 16-20

*Final week of rehearsal call time is 6:30pm*

We welcome and encourage performers of ALL races, ages, gender identities, abilities, body types and ethnicities to audition.
There is a $100 stipend offered

The play blends Victorian adventure with Monty Python–style farce. Characters are richly drawn but heightened for theatricality—committed, playful, and self-aware. Timing, transformation, and ensemble cohesion are key

All audition information can be found at: [https://cabrilloplayhouse.org/auditions-casting-call/](https://cabrilloplayhouse.org/auditions-casting-call/)

items.text:
Allen Athletinnen und Athleten der neuen Staffel von Ninja Warrior Germany wünsche ich von Herzen alles Gute, maximale Konzentration, starke Nerven und genau den Mut, den es braucht, wenn aus Training plötzlich dieser eine entscheidende Moment vor Kamera, Publikum und Parcours wird.

Was mich an diesem Format seit Jahren fasziniert, ist die Mischung aus Sprungkraft, Griffkraft, Explosivität, Technik, Ausdauer, Willen und mentaler Stärke. Genau diese Verbindung aus Vorbereitung, Timing, Präzision und Leidenschaft kenne ich aus meiner eigenen Arbeit als Filmproduzent, Kameramann, Regisseur, Cutter, Content Creator, Darsteller und Gründer der Karrideo Image- und Eventfilm Produktion Köln.

Bei Ninja Warrior Germany zählt nicht nur, wer stark ist. Es zählt, wer im richtigen Augenblick fokussiert bleibt, wer unter Druck klar denkt, wer trotz Risiko sauber entscheidet und wer nach einem Fehler wieder aufsteht. Genau diese Haltung verbindet Sport, Show, Film, Bühne, Social Media und echte Produktionserfahrung.

Ich wünsche allen Teilnehmerinnen und Teilnehmern eine starke Staffel, faire Runs, unvergessliche Bilder und den Mut, sich selbst genau dann zu übertreffen, wenn alle hinschauen.

Und allen Zuschauerinnen und Zuschauern wünsche ich viel Freude, Spannung, Gänsehaut und diesen besonderen Moment, wenn man vor dem Bildschirm mitfiebert, obwohl man selbst gar nicht am Parcours hängt.

Beste Grüße, Christian Weiße aka Karrideo Imagefilm-Produktion aka Karrideo Imagefilm-Produktion - Zuschauer, Auftraggeber, Partner 

#NinjaWarriorGermany #RTL #RTLStudios #Karrideo #ChristianWeiße

items.text:
Manchmal laufen zwei Menschen erst aneinander vorbei, bis sie merken, dass genau dort die stärkste Szene entsteht, wo sie sich wiederfinden.

Genau dafür stehen Christian Weiße und ich, Sandra Wötzel.

Wir sind nicht nur privat ein eingespieltes Team, sondern bringen auch vor der Kamera, im Content, am Set und in der Produktion eine gemeinsame Energie mit, die für Caster, Booker, Content Producer, Filmproduktionen, TV-Stationen und Sender sehr wertvoll sein kann.

Wenn Ihr uns gemeinsam bucht, bekommt Ihr nicht einfach zwei Personen. Ihr bekommt ein echtes Duo mit natürlicher Verbindung, Kameraerfahrung, Produktionsverständnis und der Fähigkeit, Situationen glaubwürdig, ruhig und nahbar wirken zu lassen.

Die Top 5 Effekte für Eure Produktion:

1. Echte Chemie statt gespielter Nähe
Unsere Verbindung ist nicht konstruiert. Sie ist da. Das spart Inszenierungsaufwand und schafft glaubwürdige Bilder.

2. Zwei Perspektiven, ein gemeinsamer Rhythmus
Christian bringt als erfahrener Filmproduzent, Content Creator und Kameramann den Blick für Bild, Timing und Wirkung mit. Ich bringe Präsenz, Natürlichkeit, Social Media Gefühl und emotionale Lesbarkeit vor der Kamera ein.

3. Weniger Reibung am Set
Wir kennen Abläufe, arbeiten zuverlässig, pünktlich, teamfähig und können uns schnell auf Tonalität, Regieanweisungen und Produktionslogik einstellen.

4. Mehr Einsatzmöglichkeiten
Ob Social Ad, UGC, TV, Fiction, Werbung, Paarrolle, Alltagsszene, Interview, Moderation, Reaction, Familienmoment oder Content-Serie, wir können einzeln oder gemeinsam gedacht werden.

5. Mehr Story in einem Booking
Unser Zusammenspiel liefert sofort erzählerische Tiefe. Begegnung, Nähe, Distanz, Wiederfinden, Vertrauen, Humor, Alltag und Emotion entstehen bei uns nicht künstlich, sondern aus echter Erfahrung.

Dieses Video ist für mich deshalb mehr als ein schöner Moment. Es ist ein Sinnbild für alle, die uns vielleicht bisher nur einzeln gesehen haben und jetzt erkennen dürfen, was möglich wird, wenn man Christian Weiße und Sandra Wötzel gemeinsam trifft, bucht und kreativ einsetzt.

Einmal buchen, zwei engagierte Menschen gewinnen. 

Sandra Wötzel und Christian Weiße

1. Echte Chemie statt gespielter Nähe
Unsere Verbindung ist nicht konstruiert. Sie ist da. Das spart Inszenierungsaufwand und schafft glaubwürdige Bilder.

2. Zwei Perspektiven, ein gemeinsamer Rhythmus
Christian bringt als erfahrener Filmproduzent, Content Creator und Kameramann den Blick für Bild, Timing und Wirkung mit. Ich bringe Präsenz, Natürlichkeit, Social Media Gefühl und emotionale Lesbarkeit vor der Kamera ein.

3. Weniger Reibung am Set
Wir kennen Abläufe, arbeiten zuverlässig, pünktlich, teamfähig und können uns schnell auf Tonalität, Regieanweisungen und Produktionslogik einstellen.

4. Mehr Einsatzmöglichkeiten
Ob Social Ad, UGC, TV, Fiction, Werbung, Paarrolle, Alltagsszene, Interview, Moderation, Reaction, Familienmoment oder Content-Serie, wir können einzeln oder gemeinsam gedacht werden.

5. Mehr Story in einem Booking
Unser Zusammenspiel liefert sofort erzählerische Tiefe. Begegnung, Nähe, Distanz, Wiederfinden, Vertrauen, Humor, Alltag und Emotion entstehen bei uns nicht künstlich, sondern aus echter Erfahrung.

Dieses Video ist für mich deshalb mehr als ein schöner Moment. Es ist ein Sinnbild für alle, die uns vielleicht bisher nur einzeln gesehen haben und jetzt erkennen dürfen, was möglich wird, wenn man Christian Weiße und Sandra Wötzel gemeinsam trifft, bucht und kreativ einsetzt.

Einmal buchen, zwei engagierte Menschen gewinnen. 

Sandra Wötzel und Christian Weiße
items.title: Manchmal laufen zwei Menschen erst aneinander vorbei, bis sie merken, dass genau dort die stärkste Szene entsteht, wo sie sich wiederfinden.

🎥 TWO-MINUTE TUESDAY 🎥  
   🎬 Talent Drop Tuesday  🎬

You met the stars. Now meet the TALENT.  

Post a 2-minute-or-less clip:  
- Monologue you love  
- Song snippet  
- Self-tape you’re proud of  
- Hidden skill: accents, instruments, stunts, puppetry — word is casted too
- Even a BTS from class/rehearsal  
-a video do your talent
- No video? Drop your best action shot + tell us the story behind it.

It doesn’t have to be perfect. It has to be YOU.  

RULES: 
No apologies. No “this is bad but…” Energy only.  
Just post it in the comments and go for it. Casting directors scroll. Let’s give them something to stop for.

items.text:
**🎬 CASTING CALL: “HALLOWED” 🎬**
*Produced by Jovial Giants Productions*

Jovial Giants Productions is seeking passionate, dedicated actors to bring *HALLOWED* to life — a chilling, faith-based thriller feature film that blends psychological tension with spiritual horror.

**📖 About the Film**
When a newly appointed priest arrives at a quiet rural church, he quickly discovers something is deeply wrong. The previous priest didn’t leave… he was sealed inside the old chapel. As whispers turn to revelations, the congregation’s expectations become terrifyingly clear — they believe he is next.

This is a story about faith under pressure, the weight of tradition, and the darkness that can hide behind devotion.

**🎥 Production Details**
* **Location:** Northeast Indiana area
* **Schedule:** June 20th-August 2nd (Weekends ONLY) 
* **Union Status:** Non-union
* **Compensation:** No pay; however, cast will receive IMDb credit, on-set snacks, and a collaborative, creatively fulfilling experience with a passionate team

**🎭 Audition Instructions**
Please submit a **self-taped audition** using the provided [SIDES HERE](https://docs.google.com/document/d/1yfSzW3nqvyFyk00hxQ9Yz-1uJZiOUQCROhDxHKqTo5o/edit?usp=sharing). You may have someone reading the other role. Begin the video with your name and anything you want us to know about you. 

Email: **jovialgiants@gmail.com**
Subject Line: **ACTOR: HALLOWED**

**🎬 Character Breakdown**
* **Elias** – (20s-30s M LEAD) The new priest. Intelligent, compassionate, and searching for purpose. His journey is the emotional core of the film as he confronts fear, doubt, and truth.
* **Caleb** – (12yo M) Steady and devoted. Trusting others to a fault.
* **Mrs. Kline** – (50s-80s F) Composed, with a quiet authority. Speaks with conviction and carries the weight of the church’s past.
* **Deacon Marsh** – (40-60s M) Welcoming on the surface, but firm in his beliefs. Represents the polished, persuasive face of the congregation.
* **Deacon Sharp** – (50s-60s M) More rigid and intense than Marsh. His faith borders on fanaticism, and he doesn’t tolerate dissent.
* **The Presence** – (Male Voiceover) A mysterious force. Ominous, ambiguous, and deeply unnerving.
* **Hannah** – (20s-30s F) Sad and angry, Elias literally left her at the altar. 
* **Father Cole** – (60s-80s M) The previous priest. Appears through flashbacks or visions. A man who uncovered too much, too late.
* **Raven** – (7yo F) Intense and perceptive. She is more in touch with what is happening at the church and chapel than the others. 
* **The Driver** – (M or F) A figure who appears briefly but leaves a lasting impression. Loud, obnoxious, but friendly. 

**✨ Why Be Part of HALLOWED?**
This is more than just a film — it’s an opportunity to collaborate on a haunting, thought-provoking story with a dedicated creative team. Whether you’re building your reel, gaining on-set experience, or looking to be part of something meaningful and atmospheric, *HALLOWED* offers a unique and memorable experience.

Step into the unknown. We’re excited to see what you bring.

**Submit your audition and join us.**

Shoot date: June 11-13

Successful, wealthy, emotionally hollow. Corporate, sharp, controlled, carrying deep loneliness.

items.title: 🎬 CASTING CALL – OTHER MANS LIFE🎬

sharedPost.text:
Good actors lose roles every single day.

Not because they’re untalented.

Because casting is usually not searching for the “best” actor.

We’re searching for:
tone.
fit.
chemistry.
trust.
world alignment.

That’s the part most actors never fully understand.

The actor who books is often the actor who makes the entire project feel more believable — not the actor showing the most range in the audition.

Casting is part art.
Part psychology.
Part risk management.

And yes…
sometimes the “best” audition changes the tone of the project in a way that hurts it.

That’s a very real conversation inside the room.

If this hit you —
share it to your stories and tag another actor who needs to hear it.

And I genuinely want to know:

Which slide hit hardest for you?

🎙️ CASTING CONFIDENTIAL
No mythology. No guesswork.
Just how it actually works.
#castingconfidentialpodcast #roseknows #castingdirectors

items.text:
POC Casting - Stoke on Trent
Hi All, I am casting for a proof of concept (POC) piece. It will be a 3-5min short based in Stoke of Trent. I am looking for the following:

Female aged 40-55 of Black origin

Male aged 40 -55 of Black or Mixed Race origin

Female aged 20-30s of Caucasian origin

It is unpaid (I know, I know) as we are using this as a pitch to obtain funding from the local areas as it is a project focused on providing opportunities for the surrounding area. This is a POC with a view to becoming a FULLY paid vertical series. We intend to keep the actors onboard depending on performance and availability.

We are however covering travel, food, and ensure well-being and psychological safety come first on set. 

Ideally actors from the local area are preferred but not limited to.

Do send me a DM if you would like to provide a self tape to be part of the selection process.

Take care.

POC Casting - Stoke on Trent
Hi All, I am casting for a proof of concept (POC) piece. It will be a 3-5min short based in Stoke of Trent. I am looking for the following:

Female aged 40-55 of Black origin

Male aged 40 -55 of Black or Mixed Race origin

Female aged 20-30s of Caucasian origin

It is unpaid (I know, I know) as we are using this as a pitch to obtain funding from the local areas as it is a project focused on providing opportunities for the surrounding area. This is a POC with a view to becoming a FULLY paid vertical series. We intend to keep the actors onboard depending on performance and availability.

We are however covering travel, food, and ensure well-being and psychological safety come first on set. 

Ideally actors from the local area are preferred but not limited to.

Do send me a DM if you would like to provide a self tape to be part of the selection process.

Take care.
items.title: POC Casting - Stoke on Trent

items.text: hi! Im 14 years old and my dream is to be successful someday in the film industry either as an actor or director. Right now I’m starting off trying acting I’ve been in short films and theatre but how do i get an agent. Everybody keeps telling me I need an agent and I’m totally okay with that but how? if anyone has any tips for anything id love to hear : )

topComments.text: Contact Articulate. They train teenage actors on zoom and have their own agency.

Hi Ari. An agent is very useful to have, but not essential. The most important thing is a good, SHORT, showreel. About 2-3 mins long. A good quality video of you doing a couple of brief pieces you’re comfortable with. Then, look at what casting directors worked on the kinds of things you’d like a shot at, and send them the reel, with a brief introduction. That’s it for starters. You can use the same approach with agents but deffo begin with casting directors. Good luck!

items.text:
📸 [TFP] Warszawa — szukam osób do sesji.
Dzień dobry 

Rozbudowuję portfolio fotograficzne i szukam osób chętnych na klimatyczne sesje zdjęciowe w Warszawie.

Szukam zarówno modeli i modelek, aktorów, jak i osób bez doświadczenia — najważniejsza jest naturalność, charakter i ciekawa energia przed obiektywem.

✨ Klimat zdjęć:

• portret

• fashion 

• delikatna nagość zakryta ( bielizna)

• plener miejski 

📍 Gdzie?

Będę organizował Apartament Typu Studio w Warszawie 

⏳ Sesja:

 Czas sesji do 2h

📷 W zamian:

TFP — otrzymasz 20 profesjonalnie obrobionych zdjęć do portfolio, social mediów lub castingów.

📢 Możliwa Dalsza współpraca komercyjna

Jeśli masz ochotę na zdjęcia napisz komentarz lub wiadomość prywatną 🙂💪

items.text:
Ochota na orzeźwienie? Brzmi jak plan! Trwa casting do reklamy znanego napoju! 🧋

! NOWY CASTING ! ROLE MÓWIONE ! WYSOKIE STAWKI !

Do dynamicznej, energetycznej reklamy popularnego napoju poszukujemy naturalnych, charyzmatycznych osób z prawdziwą energią!

Poszukujemy:

items.text:
🎬 CASTING-ALARM: Wirst du Teil von Uwe Bolls nächstem Blockbuster? 🎬

Du wolltest schon immer mal Filmluft schnuppern, Regie-Legende Uwe Boll live in Action erleben und dich selbst auf der großen Leinwand sehen? 

Dann ist das hier deine Chance!

Für einen spektakulären Filmdreh (und zwar dem inoffiziellen HOUSE OF THE DEAD Sequel: 23 YEARS LATER – ZOMBIES IN THE CASTLE) verwandeln wir die legendäre Burg Frankenstein in eine filmische Kulisse – und wir brauchen DICH als Statist, Komparse oder Crew-Mitglied hinter der Kamera!!

🏰 DIE FACTS:

Wann: Anfang September 2026 (04.09. - etwa 09.09.)

Wo: Burg Frankenstein, Mühltal bei Darmstadt

🧟 WEN WIR SUCHEN:

Jede Menge motivierte Gesichter! Egal ob jung oder alt, „Männlein“ oder „Weiblein“, markant oder klassisch – wir suchen die volle Bandbreite an Charakteren.

Wir brauchen Leute, die Bock auf ein unvergessliches Set-Erlebnis haben. 

Keine Vorerfahrung nötig! Bring einfach gute Laune, Geduld (ja, Filmsets bedeuten auch mal Warten 😉) und die Bereitschaft mit, Vollgas zu geben, wenn es heißt: „Und Action!“. 
Und zwar sowohl VOR, als auch HINTER der Kamera! 

💥 DAS ERWARTET DICH:

👉Ein exklusiver Blick hinter die Kulissen einer echten Film-Produktion.

👉Kulinarische Verpflegung am Set (niemand hungert bei uns!).

👉Eine unvergessliche Zeit auf einer der unheimlichsten und coolsten Burgen Deutschlands. (Das wird mein 7. Film. Und, ja, es war jedesmal eine absolut coole und unvergessliche Zeit!!)

 🔥Bist du bereit für das filmische Inferno auf Burg Frankenstein? Dann bewirb dich JETZT! 🔥

📩Schicke uns einfach eine kurze Nachricht per WhatsApp an:  an:  

+49 151 681 72 591

Teilen erwünscht! Markiert eure Freunde, die schon immer mal ins Kino gehörten!

‼️Und noch ein wichtiger privater Tipp: ‼️

Da es sich um einen Horrorfilm handelt, bringt unbedingt einen kompletten Satz Wechselkleidung mit!!

(Unterwäsche, Socken, Hose, Shirt und, ganz wichtig, Schuhe!! Auch ein Handtuch wäre nicht schlecht, da man nach Drehende eventuell doch etwas „blutig“ aussehen könnte.)

@Follower 
#UweBoll #movie #movies #horror #splatter #germany #frankenstein #independent #fun

items.text:
# **Looking for driven creators & creative entrepreneurs to join our roster.**

I'm a **Community Impact Producer** 
I connect community-driven businesses and social enterprises (brands with real missions, not just profit goals) to talented creators who can tell their stories.

**What I'm building:** A team of collaborators who create branded content and short films that showcase what we do best. This content becomes our leverage to land paid opportunities with businesses and brands who value our style, impact, and community connection. #COLLECTIVEEFFORT

**What I need from you:**
* Self-driven and passionate about your craft
* Ready to create NOW (no excuses, no delays)
* Interested in building a real career in the creative space
* Comfortable with an intensive, productive work pace

**What this isn't:**
* A casual hobby project
* A "maybe someday" opportunity

**If you're interested, speak up and be ready to go.** This is for people who want to build something real.

Comment your FOCUS and GOALS if interested.

topComments.text:
You should have your parent monitor anything you are posting in groups like this. These people aren't vetted. In LA to work with a minor they must have a CPS permit. 

If you are serious about this kind of work you need training and an agent. An agent or manager will act as a buffer to keep you safe in an industry that isn't safe.

Please do not meet or talk to strangers. It's already a red flag if they are talking to you without an adult.

I'm a youth performer advocate and the parent of a teen actor. 

The safest way to get into this work is to do some classes and get representation.
Girl close your shirt, you are only to attract pedos on here who will take advantage of you. Get your parents to find you an agent and stop posting in fb groups.

items.text:
👑 WOW… WHAT A RESPONSE! 👑

We have had a HUGE amount of interest for our Six Queens showcase performance for Majestic Academy of Performing Arts and not just students from our academy ✨

Thank you so much to everyone who has messaged, shared the post and shown interest already! *Please see all details on poster*

*The song you must sing MUST BE from SIX along with an introduction*

Please understand we can not answer multiple questions, all information is in the poster! 

Please note:
This is for our Festival Showcase Performance and not a full production of Six.

If you are not successful this time, please do not be discouraged 💜 We will also be casting for future showcase performances and building TWO performance teams for future events, competitions and opportunities.

Weekly training and rehearsals will take place in Chester ✨
We can’t wait to see all of your auditions Queens 👑

#Six #PerformingArts #MusicalTheatre #StageSchool #SixthForm

❗️UWAGA ZGŁOSZENIA PRZYJMUJEMY DO NAJBLIŻSZEGO PIĄTKU❗️ 

Poszukujemy zdolnego Epizodysty w wieku 18-40 do przeprowadzenia sondy ulicznej   

Projekt będzie realizowany przez 5 dni na początku Lipca w Warszawie (czekamy na szczegoly od Produkcji) 
Zależy nam na Osobie otwartej, komunikatywnej 

Zgłoszenia proszę kierować na statysci@profesjatv.pl 

W treści wiadomości podajemy: 
• Imię i nazwisko

items.text:
COMEDY LAB WITH JIM WILLIAMS
Improv Workshop in Warsaw

📅 May 31st
🕓 16:00
📍 Południk 2.0

Looking to become more spontaneous, confident, creative, or simply more comfortable connecting with people?

Join American comedian and performer Jim Williams for a practical, hands-on improv workshop focused on presence, listening, instinct and real human connection.

With over 20 years of experience performing across theatres, festivals, comedy clubs and unconventional spaces around Europe, Jim brings a direct and supportive approach to improvisation that focuses less on “being funny” and more on reacting honestly in the moment.

This session is open to:
• complete beginners
• performers
• overthinkers
• creatives
• curious humans

Through exercises, scene work and experimentation, participants will:

• improve spontaneity and listening
• build confidence in front of others
• react more naturally in the moment
• connect and collaborate through play
• get out of their head and into the scene

No pressure.
No perfection required.
Just a supportive space to explore, take risks and enjoy the process.

Duration:
Approximately 2 to 2.5 hours

Whether you want to improve performance skills, social confidence, creativity or simply try something different, this is a chance to experience improv in a relaxed and human way.

Come curious.
Leave buzzing.

🎟️ Registration:
https://fienta.com/pl/comedy-lab-with-jim-williams-4-session-workshop-177051

@impactwarsaw
@miguelatcomedy
impactwarsaw.com

Inner Circle:
https://t.me/+xJpuxiG5Au8xMmZk

items.text:
**CASTING CALL for Child** **Actor**

Hello! We're looking for a young actor to join our re-creation of 'The Odyssey'! It's a musical feature to be posted on YouTube. This project is a continuation of my other productions, reaching over 800k views! 

*Project:*  'The Odyssey', based on 'EPIC: The Musical'. Specifically Circe's Island. 

*Producer:* Vega Cos Productions 

*Role:* Young girl, 4-7 yrs, playing a forest Nymph. No lines. Must be comfortable being held by strangers and looking nervous. No acting experience needed. 

*Date and Location:* June 12, likely 3 hours. Vancouver BC

*Pay:* Volunteer role with $50 honorarium

Please send head shot, demo reel and resume (if you have them) to lyra@vegacos.ca

topComments.text: Bonus points if she has naturally pointed ears? 😆

KARATE MASTER

Female. 30s–50s. Open Ethnicity.

We are looking for a fit, disciplined woman with real martial arts experience and strong physical coordination.

She should feel authentic performing karate chops, kicks, and sharp physical movements on camera — and fully commit to a powerful “HIYAHH!” while doing it.

COMPENSATION IF BOOKED & USED IN THE COMMERCIAL IS UPWARDS OF $6500.00 CAD PER PERSON

THIS IS A NON UNION JOB. IF YOU HAVE AN AGENT, PLEASE ASK THEM TO SUBMIT YOU OVER BREAKDOWNEXPRESS

items.text:
**AUDITION NOTICE**

*The Tragicall Historie of Doctor Faustus* by Christopher Marlowe

Directed by Melanie White - Rough Magic Theatre

AUDITIONS:

Saturday June 13: 10am-3pm

Sunday, June 14: 10am-1pm 

Callbacks: Sunday, June 14 1pm-5pm

Pay: $250 stipend. 

Union and Non-Union performers welcome.

BIPOC performers are strongly encouraged to audition!

What is your soul worth? Craving unlimited knowledge and influence, John Faustus makes a literal deal with the devil: 24 years of magic and power in exchange for his mortal soul. At first, the bargain feels thrilling, but as time runs out, Faustus is forced to confront the true cost of his ambition. Darkly funny, provocative, and surprisingly modern, *Doctor Faustus* explores what happens when the cost of power is everything. 

*Doctor Faustus* will play at the Vancouver Fringe Festival, performing September 10-20, 2026 on Granville Island. Rehearsals will be in the evenings and weekends in July and August, 2-4 times a week. 

Please submit a headshot and resume to [roughmagictheatrevancouver@gmail.com](mailto:roughmagictheatrevancouver@gmail.com) and mention which role(s) you think you are right for.

We will contact you to set up an audition time. Please be prepared to read from sides (provided in advance) and to perform a 1-2 minute classical monologue of your choice.

CHARACTER BREAKDOWN:

**FAUSTUS**: 20s-early 30s, any race, male-presenting. John Faustus is a brilliant but arrogant scholar who becomes dissatisfied with the limits of scholarly knowledge. Hungry for power, pleasure, and ultimate understanding, he makes a pact with the devil, trading his soul for magical abilities and worldly rewards. Although intelligent and ambitious, Faustus is deeply flawed by pride, insecurity, and an inability to repent.

**ENSEMBLE** (aka Everyone Else): **Three** roles, 20s-40s, any race, any gender. These three actors play a combined 30+ characters, so we are looking for versatile character actors who can create a distinct persona with just a few strokes. Strong physical and vocal transformation skills are essential. Experience with heightened text, clowning, comedy, and/or physical theatre is an asset.

Please note that the role of **MEPHISTOPHELES** has already been cast.

(Graphic design: Sidney Martin)

items.text:
📢 NOW CALLING ALL DANCERS: THE WARRIORS HAVE ARRIVED!
FIND US ON ANY MUSIC APP BY SEARCHING FOR  "KPOP DANCE WARRIOR GIRLS"

​The wait is over. Kpop Dance Warrior Girls has officially landed, and we are looking for the founding members of the Kpop Dance Warrior Girls crew. This isn't just an audition; it’s a global movement to define a brand-new era of movement.

​Our music is already taking over the airwaves—you can find us on over 150+ music streaming platforms, including Spotify, Apple Music, Pandora, iHeartRadio, Amazon. and All music platforms worldwide. 

 Pick out one of our songs and  create your own original DANCE ROUTINE TO 15 seconds of the SONG AND WE WILL FEATURE YOU ON OUR MUSIC promotional PLATFORMS! Just have one of your friends record you with your mobile phone. once you finish your 15-second original dance routine, add it to your social media using the hashtag 

#kpopdancewarriorgirls SO WE CAN ADD YOU TO OUR MUSIC PLATFORMS

FIND OUR SOCIAL MEDIA ON OUR LINK TREE LINK BELOW:

https://linktr.ee/kpopdancewarriorgirls

OUR SPOTIFY PROFILE LINK:

https://open.spotify.com/artist/1CN6wANDa4jF1FskMpNe4Y?si=wOxmvlC1R4GT1Z9a_ZcWgQ

YOUTUBE MUSIC: 

https://music.youtube.com/channel/UCrA9tVA2J0g7YWJ9wjlLZrw?si=BiIQNy6u_tExAi8m

Now, we need the talent to bring those beats to life.

​🏆 THE CHALLENGE: CREATE A NEW STYLE

​We aren't looking for covers. We want innovators. We are looking for dancers, singers, & rappers who can help create a signature, never-before-seen dance style specifically for the Kpop Dance Warrior Girls.

​📲 HOW TO AUDITION (MOBILE-FRIENDLY)

​Joining the competition is easy. You don’t need a professional studio—just your phone and your talent:

​Record your audition using your mobile phone.

​Showcase your original choreography to any Kpop Dance Warrior track.

​Upload it to your favorite social media platform.

​Use the official hashtags below to enter the competition and get scouted!

#KpopDanceWarriorGirls

​Power & Precision: High energy that commands the screen.

​Creativity: A unique flair that sets you apart from the crowd.

​The world is listening to our music. Now, it’s time for them to see your moves. 

BY USING OUR MUSIC & HASHTAG IT WILL MAKE YOU A RECOGNIZED CREATIVE PART OF OUR NEW GIRL GROUP FAN 8ASE.

items.summary:
📢 NOW CALLING ALL DANCERS: THE WARRIORS HAVE ARRIVED!
FIND US ON ANY MUSIC APP BY SEARCHING FOR  "KPOP DANCE WARRIOR GIRLS"

​The wait is over. Kpop Dance Warrior Girls has officially landed, and we are looking for the founding members of the Kpop Dance Warrior Girls crew. This isn't just an audition; it’s a global movement to define a brand-new era of movement.

​Our music is already taking over the airwaves—you can find us on over 150+ music streaming platforms, including Spotify, Apple Music, Pandora, iHeartRadio, Amazon. and All music platforms worldwide. 

 Pick out one of our songs and  create your own original DANCE ROUTINE TO 15 seconds of the SONG AND WE WILL FEATURE YOU ON OUR MUSIC promotional PLATFORMS! Just have one of your friends record you with your mobile phone. once you finish your 15-second original dance routine, add it to your social media using the hashtag 

#kpopdancewarriorgirls SO WE CAN ADD YOU TO OUR MUSIC PLATFORMS

FIND OUR SOCIAL MEDIA ON OUR LINK TREE LINK BELOW:

https://linktr.ee/kpopdancewarriorgirls

OUR SPOTIFY PROFILE LINK:

https://open.spotify.com/artist/1CN6wANDa4jF1FskMpNe4Y?si=wOxmvlC1R4GT1Z9a_ZcWgQ

YOUTUBE MUSIC: 

https://music.youtube.com/channel/UCrA9tVA2J0g7YWJ9wjlLZrw?si=BiIQNy6u_tExAi8m

🎬 ZDJĘCIE DO REKWIZYTU – DO WSPÓŁCZESNEGO SERIALU 🎬  

Do sesji rekwizytowej poszukujemy zdjęcia dojrzałej, ciepłej kobiety w wieku powyżej 60 lat

Zdjęcie zostanie wykorzystane w scenie na okładce magazynu dla kobiet 

💰 Stawka: 40 zł netto  
(płatne przelewem po odesłaniu wypełnionej umowy)

📅 Termin nadsyłania zgłoszeń:  
23 maja, godz. 20:00  

📩 Zgłoszenia prosimy wysyłać na maila:  
impresariat.kamedstudio@gmail.com  
Temat wiadomości: „zdjęcie”

📝 W zgłoszeniu prosimy zawrzeć:  
– imię i nazwisko  
– wiek  
– 2 przykładowe zdjęcia (selfie)  

📸 Wymagania do zdjęć:  
– bez osób towarzyszących  
– bez nakryć głowy  
– bez okularów  
– tło dowolne  

⚠️ Osoba wysyłająca zdjęcie musi posiadać pełne prawa do jego wykorzystania.

Zapraszamy! 🎥

sharedPost.text:
1200 Jahre Niederkalbach — Cinematic Homeland Orchestra | Urheberrechtsfreie Musik | Keine Content ID

Tauchen Sie ein in die emotionale und zeitlose Welt von „1200 Jahre Niederkalbach“ von Didier Junk – eine monumentale, cineastische Orchesterreise durch Erinnerungen, Heimat, Generationen, das Dorfleben, Kirchenglocken, Wälder, Felder und 1200 Jahre Menschheitsgeschichte.

Diese Musik eignet sich für:
Dorfjubiläen
Produktionen über europäische Landschaften
Familiengeschichtsvideos
dramatisches kulturelles Storytelling
cineastische Rückblenden
historische Atmosphäre-Projekte
emotionale Orchesterfilme

„1200 Jahre Niederkalbach“ verwandelt Erinnerung, Tradition und menschliche Verbundenheit in ein gigantisches cineastisches Orchestererlebnis voller Wärme, Nostalgie und historischer Erhabenheit.

Diese Musikbibliothek steht Creatoren KOSTENLOS zur Verfügung, ohne Content-ID-Ansprüche für die Standardnutzung auf YouTube und in sozialen Medien.

Wenn Sie:
exklusive Original-Tracks
Premium-Kinoversionen
kommerzielle Lizenzen
Extended Editions
Soundtrack-Kollektionen nur für Mitglieder
direkte Unterstützung für den Komponisten wünschen,

ziehen Sie bitte eine Kanalmitgliedschaft bei Didier Junk in Betracht.

Perfekt für:
Heimatatmosphäre • Historisches Orchester • Wall Of Sound • Emotionale Instrumentalmusik • Deutsche Landschaft • Historisches Gedächtnis • Cineastisches Storytelling • Warme Orchestermusik • Dorfjubiläum • Monumentale Emotionen

#Niederkalbach #Filmmusik #WallOfSound #EpischesOrchester #Heimatmusik #HistorischeMusik #EmotionalesOrchester #Instrumentalmusik #DeutscheLandschaft #Dorfatmosphäre #CineastischesStorytelling #UrheberrechtsfreieMusik #KostenloseMusik #KeineContentID #HistorischeAtmosphäre #EmotionaleMusik #DidierJunk #Orchestermusik #EuropäischeGeschichte #WarmeFilmmusik

sharedPost.text:
🎤 Riffs & Runs – neue Podcastfolge ist da!
Kennst Du diesen Gänsehautmoment, wenn die Band stoppt und die Sängerin alles aus dem letzten Ton herausholt? Diese atemberaubenden, schnellen Melodieläufe – das sind Vocal Riffs & Runs. 🎤✨
In meiner neuen Podcastfolge erkläre ich, was dahintersteckt – und gebe Dir ein paar einfache Übungen mit, damit Du erste Schritte in Richtung Riffs & Runs machen kannst. 🎵
👉 Link in Bio oder direkt hier: https://singasong-behappy.de/podcast-fur-gesang-und-stimme/
Oder auf Spotify, Apple Podcasts & überall, wo es Podcasts gibt. 🎧
#Gesang #Singen #VocalRiffs #Runs #Melisma

Ever wonder how much child actors make for a quick set day? 👀🎬

We drove up to LA from San Diego and were there less than an hour and a half total.

That amount is AFTER taxes, Coogan account contributions, and agency fees were already taken out.

Honestly, it still surprises me compared to what I made at my first job.
Would you have guessed it would be more or less? 👀

items.text:
🎭 THE METHOD THAT LEAD ME TO BOOK NETFLIX AND FEATURE FILM ROLES
After speaking to hundreds of actors, I keep hearing the same thing:

You sit in class for hours…
but only get 15–20 minutes actually working.

You bounce between different teachers, all with different methods.

Then you get notes like:
“Make it more believable.”
“Be more truthful.”
“Make stronger choices.”

…but no one really explains HOW to do that.

No clear exercises.
No actual technique you can repeat.
No real way to track improvement.

So you leave class overthinking and confused about how to actually get better.

Hi everyone, my name is Freya Tingley.

I’m an Australian actress working across international film and television, including SERIES REGULAR roles in two Netflix series and LEAD roles in six feature films. I starred in Jersey Boys directed by CLINT EASTWOOD and played Wendy Darling on ONCE UPON A TIME.

Acting is an incredibly competitive industry, and honestly, I see it a lot like professional sport.

Athletes don’t just play games. They train specific skills over and over so that when it’s time to compete, they have an edge.

Acting should be no different.

That’s why I created my groundbreaking acting program containing all the tools that have led to my success booking work.

🎬 1-hour private Zoom sessions.

The outcome:
An actor who is confident embodying a variety of characters and who can deliver emotionally impactful performances consistently leading to an actor who BOOKS WORK.

If this resonates with you, comment ACTING below or better yet, send me a DM 🤗

items.text:
**Open Call — The New Symposium **

The New Symposium is launching new groups this weekend! It invites musicians, researchers, and artists working across music and related artistic disciplines 

—

Join one of **five ongoing groups** to take part in the** first in-person gathering at the 6th edition of Bled Contemporary Music Week in June**, where participants will exchange ideas and create together throughout the week in an open, collaborative format.

Participants form an interdisciplinary working group and develop their practice in dialogue with an international community. Weekly online exchanges, cross-disciplinary collaboration, and long-term peer learning create a dynamic space shaped by participants’ needs, enabling artistic growth and development.

**GROUPS and their orientation: **
* Friday I – Composition & Research based
* Friday II – Production & projects development
* Saturday I – Performance & Composition, emphasis on theoretical exploration 
* Saturday II – Interdisciplinary Group, Practice as the foundation for discussions
* Sunday I – Composition & Performance 

—

Participation fee: 100€ monthly

items.summary:
**Open Call — The New Symposium **

The New Symposium is launching new groups this weekend! It invites musicians, researchers, and artists working across music and related artistic disciplines 

—

Join one of **five ongoing groups** to take part in the** first in-person gathering at the 6th edition of Bled Contemporary Music Week in June**, where participants will exchange ideas and create together throughout the week in an open, collaborative format.

Participants form an interdisciplinary working group and develop their practice in dialogue with an international community. Weekly online exchanges, cross-disciplinary collaboration, and long-term peer learning create a dynamic space shaped by participants’ needs, enabling artistic growth and development.

**GROUPS and their orientation: **
* Friday I – Composition & Research based
* Friday II – Production & projects development
* Saturday I – Performance & Composition, emphasis on theoretical exploration 
* Saturday II – Interdisciplinary Group, Practice as the foundation for discussions
* Sunday I – Composition & Performance 

—

Participation fee: 100€ monthly 

Apply before May 25, to join the program and festival in June

items.previewTitle:
📣📣CASTING CALL for our DYLAN (playing 16) 🎬🎭

Mild, likeable, quietly funny and watchful. The friend who helps you up, laughs it off and makes adults assume everything is fine. Until the pressure hits.

Actors 18+ (must be able to play 16). Ideally SE, Sussex, Brighton-based.

Dylan is practical and easy to trust, the kind of boy who keeps the peace without needing credit. Underneath, he is fiercely protective and loyal to the point of dangerous. When he is scared, he lies cleanly. When he is cornered, he goes quiet and decisive. His darkness is not loud. It is controlled, and capable of crossing a line he cannot uncross.

Inspo (in order): Devin Druid as Tyler Down in 13 Reasons Why, Nicholas Brendon as Xander in Buffy, @raphael_luce  as Henry Creel in Stranger Things, Jess in Gilmore Girls plus that ordinary-then-unsettling flip of Owen Cooper as Jamie Miller in Adolescence. Welcome to Brighton 🎈Stephen King vibes, 1990s, Britpop, vertical drama.

Submit by email: TAWHT@vivlovesfilm.com with subject line DYLAN. Include bio, actual age, playing age, headshot, showreel (if you have), Spotlight link (if relevant) and a short note on why Dylan speaks to you.

Will you join our pack? 🐺🫶🏼🐺

#casting #castingcall #malelead #brighton

items.previewTitle:
📣📣 CASTING CALL for our ROBIN (playing 16)🎬🎭

Sensitive, likeable, quietly magnetic and always clocking the room. The boy who makes you feel seen. The one who can laugh along, keep pace, and make it look like nothing gets to him. Until it does.

Actors 18+ (must be able to play 16). Ideally SE, Sussex, Brighton-based.

Robin is smart and emotionally tuned-in, the kind of kid adults underestimate because he seems polite and “fine”. He is the friend who listens, the friend who notices, the friend who remembers. Underneath, he is desperate to belong, and that need makes him adaptable in ways that scare him later. When he senses danger, he does not always speak. When the group shifts, he shifts with it. His flaw is not cruelty. It is silence. And once he has stayed quiet, he cannot un-know what he allowed.

Inspo (in order): 

Dylan Minnette as Clay Jensen in 13 Reasons Why
Graham Verchere as Miles Miller in Summer of 84
Lonnie Chavis as young Randall Pearson in This Is Us
Wil Wheaton as Gordie Lachance in Stand By Me
Ethan Hawke in Dead Poets Society 

Welcome to Brighton 🎈Stephen King vibes, 1990s, Britpop, vertical drama.

Submit by email: TAWHT@vivlovesfilm.com with subject line ROBIN. Include bio, actual age, playing age, headshot, showreel (if you have), Spotlight link (if relevant) and a short note on why Robin speaks to you.

Will you join our pack? 🐺🫶🏼🐺

#casting #castingcall #malelead #brighton

items.text:
Hey guys!! Happy Summer!!! Classes are now open for June! We teach the business part other classes leave out - how to get repped once you're ready for rep, how to make sure your headshots are working for you, how to expand rep into other markets, etc -- all while doing a deep dive into TV, film, and commercial. We also offer incredible, informative VO classes for actors wanting to get into voice work!  Would love to have you with us for June! Teachers have all been working in the business for 10+ years professionally. Come learn from Film/Commercial Casting Directors, NYC/LA agents, and VO casting professionals!

To learn more about the classes we offer, please visit: www.sarahdowlingcasting.com/actors

To register or ask any questions, please email us at: SarahDowlingCasting@gmail.com

Thanks!

items.text:
Casting male actor in the 40-50s age range- should be attractive, brown hair.
This is a lead role in the film with roughly 4-5 short scenes with very minimal dialogue. 

PLEASE NOTE: this is a student film, it is no pay but all actors will receive IMDb credits. 

Synopsis:

Unforgettable is a story of a woman’s desperate attempt to get pregnant and on her journey, gets an unexpected message from her beloved Grandfather from the afterlife.

And how the signs along the way of her journey, whispered to her, what gifts would be put in her path. A true story of one woman’s synchronicity and love. 

FILMING IN THE LOS ANGELES AREA. Actors MUST be local to LA or the San Fernando Valley!

If you are interested or know someone who might fit the role please DM me! Thank you!

Next Level Acting...Next Level You

Three days. One technique. No limits.

The Meisner Technique is one of the most powerful acting methods in the world — and this June, we’re bringing it to Central London.
Meisner Foundation Course

📅 8, 9 & 10 June
🕐 11am – 3pm
📍 Central London

Three days. Twelve hours. A completely new relationship with your craft.
DM us or email hello@meisnerlondon.com to secure your place.
#MeisnerTechnique #ActingLondon #LondonActors #ActingWorkshop #Meisner ActingTraining TheatreLondon

items.text:
***CASTING***

“Everything I ever wanted to say”
 

A pub, a book, a bunch of actors and all the things that were never meant to be said.

A play about actors looking for their next monologues from a tried and trusted book which inadvertently brings about reflection, resentment and revelations.

 

The team behind Rock, Paper, Scissors are looking for people to collaborate on a new piece. We’re looking for actors with comedic timing whose are open to bringing 

along a heartfelt piece they’ve always wanted to write. Something deep and personal they want to say which will be kept anonymous but will play a pivotal part of the performance. 

 

About us!

 

[https://thisweekculture.com/article/chess-hayden-rock-paper-scissors/](https://eur03.safelinks.protection.outlook.com/?url=https%3A%2F%2Fthisweekculture.com%2Farticle%2Fchess-hayden-rock-paper-scissors%2F&data=05%7C02%7Cemma.lo%40london.anglican.org%7C71460c89cf3c41f4778c08deba92d268%7Ceb60a373df9e411f87389f78780356d5%7C0%7C0%7C639153336926069653%7CUnknown%7CTWFpbGZsb3d8eyJFbXB0eU1hcGkiOnRydWUsIlYiOiIwLjAuMDAwMCIsIlAiOiJXaW4zMiIsIkFOIjoiTWFpbCIsIldUIjoyfQ%3D%3D%7C0%7C%7C%7C&sdata=TSsrnHUWaYLzKjKXEdxTf3%2BxlMk7bduZ9wJ2rE3dWVc%3D&reserved=0)

 

[https://playstosee.com/reviews/uk-reviews/london/rock-paper-scissors/](https://eur03.safelinks.protection.outlook.com/?url=https%3A%2F%2Fplaystosee.com%2Freviews%2Fuk-reviews%2Flondon%2Frock-paper-scissors%2F&data=05%7C02%7Cemma.lo%40london.anglican.org%7C71460c89cf3c41f4778c08deba92d268%7Ceb60a373df9e411f87389f78780356d5%7C0%7C0%7C639153336926095008%7CUnknown%7CTWFpbGZsb3d8eyJFbXB0eU1hcGkiOnRydWUsIlYiOiIwLjAuMDAwMCIsIlAiOiJXaW4zMiIsIkFOIjoiTWFpbCIsIldUIjoyfQ%3D%3D%7C0%7C%7C%7C&sdata=pRpcOQxQc7kX78dD%2B0X82D1OBTs5kbOngODJk8pDC%2Fk%3D&reserved=0)

 

Dates and venue TBC

 

We understand everyone’s time is important and all writing material will be credited. This will be a profit share performance with tech rehearsals paid for.

  To express interest and for more info please contact: rpscasting2023@gmail.com

We look forward to hearing from you!

items.text:
CASTING FOR CHARACTERS!

---

CHASING SHADOWS (Chasing Shadows) - Pilot Episode

A crime/thriller online tv series that follows Astrid Clarke, an FBI agent torn between her family and her job when her brother joins a dangerous gang.

*LOCATION:*

Peterborough, UK

*CASTING REQUIREMENTS: ALL APPLICANTS HAVE TO BE 18+*

**Simon Clarke: **American accent. Visibly looks late twenties

**Classroom people/Park goers:** Anything goes. Open to all. We will try to fit in some improv discussions, but it will depend on what happens on the day with times.

*DATE & TIME:*

Current dates are **June 29th - July 1st**, but you would be needed for only one day, dependant on which character you are chosen for.

*PAYMENT & EXPENSES:*

**Unpaid, **as this is being funded personally. **Travel** will be **covered** **within** the **Peterborough** area **only**. Food is covered.

*CONTACT:*

Either DM me here, or email me at:

hannahlwalker02@hotmail.com

*OTHER IMPORTANT INFO:*

Simon’s character has a specific wardrobe, so Simon will need to be brought on board by June 10th at the VERY latest. June 1st ideally. Other characters by June 10th also, to allow script revision and prep time.

There are some T’s and C’s for Simon, but those can be discussed privately, such as character reappearances.

Thanks!

items.text:
🎬CASTING CALL — PERFORMERS WANTED 

We are looking for performers to take part in the office sequences of “Modern Day Sisyphus”, an independent psychological/absurdist short film directed by Berk Köseoğlu.

This is not traditional background work; the scenes involve synchronized movement, physical performance, repetitive choreography, and featured moments within the frame.

We are especially interested in:

• actors
• theatre performers
• dancers/movers
• expressive faces
• people comfortable with stylized performance

Performers will also have some lines.

SHOOT DATE:
One shooting day between June 11th, 16th and 18th, 2026.
(final office date TBC)

LOCATION:
Budapest, Hungary.

TO APPLY:
Send:

* recent photos
* age
* acting experience (if any)

to:
contactingdianag@gmail.com

IMPORTANT:
This is an unpaid independent production. Food/snacks will be provided on set, and the film is planned for festival submissions.

• MEROPE (Female, early 30s)
• GLAUCUS (Child, early 10s)
• TANTALUS (Male, late 30s–early 40s)

Casting sessions will be held in person.

TO APPLY:
Please send:

• Recent photos/headshots
• CV/resume (if available)
• Demo reel

to: contactingdianag@gmail.com

IMPORTANT:
This is an unpaid independent production. Food/snacks will be provided on set, and the film is intended for festival submissions.

items.text:
🎬 Für unseren Bachelor-Abschlussfilm suchen wir dringend noch einen Schauspieler für eine Vaterrolle, als auch zwei Kleindartseller.

Gedreht wird ein Mystery-Thriller als One-Take (mit Hidden Cuts), inspiriert von „Adolescence“ und „Knives Out“.

👤 Vater von Lennard

•⁠  ⁠männlich, Spielalter 50–60, deutsch

Lennards Vater ist der Stadtpolizist der Kleinstadt: streng, stur, kontrolliert und wenig emotional. Er glaubt an Ordnung und klare Regeln, handelt aber aus dem Wunsch heraus, seine Familie zu beschützen.

👤 Stadtpolizist (Kleindarsteller)

 männlich, Spielalter 35–60, ab 180 cm

📅 Dreh: 28.05. (Nachtdreh, auf den 29.05.)

📍 Erdweg bei Dachau

🍽️ Verpflegung & ggf. Unterkunft vorhanden

💰 Studentenfilm, leider ohne Gage

topComments.text: Heyhey, bin interessiert :)
Bin 34, vielleicht würde es ja passen

items.text: Min kæreste købte laks til os for en uge siden. Jeg havde planlagt at lave den til aftensmad i dag, men da jeg tog den ud af køleskabet og tøede den op, bemærkede jeg en gul plet på den. Hvad er det? Er det sikkert at spise? Jeg har børn og vil ikke gøre dem syge. Skal jeg smide den ud?

items.text: I aften lavede min svigermor aftensmad med hakket oksekød, men hun skyllede det ikke. Jeg kunne ikke spise det, og jeg forhindrede også mine børn i at spise det. Jeg skyller altid hakket oksekød inden tilberedning. Jeg kan ikke fatte, at hun ikke gør det. Er det ikke nødvendigt? Se detaljerne i den første kommentar.

Ochota na orzeźwienie? Brzmi jak plan! Trwa casting do reklamy znanego napoju! 

! NOWY CASTING ! ROLE MÓWIONE ! WYSOKIE STAWKI !

Do dynamicznej, energetycznej reklamy popularnego napoju poszukujemy naturalnych, charyzmatycznych osób z prawdziwą energią!

Poszukujemy:

Główny bohater- Mężczyzna 20-40 lat, rola mówiona. Dobrze zbudowany. Mile widziane długie włosy, ale nie są konieczne.

PRZYJACIELE — DZIEWCZYNY Kobiety 20–25 lat — epizod. Różne typy urody. Mile widziane charakterystyczne cechy.

PRZYJACIELE — CHŁOPCY Mężczyźni 20–25 lat — epizod. Różne typy urody. Mile widziane charakterystyczne cechy.

STAWKI:

Od 5 do nawet 12 000 !!!

MATERIAŁY DO NAGRANIA:
WIZYTÓWKA + SCENKA

TIMING:

Zgłoszenia: do 27.05 do godz. 18:00 

Recall: 31.05 (niedziela)

Przymiarki: 3.06 i 5.06

Zdjęcia: 8.06/Warszawa

ZGŁOSZENIA:

Zgłoszenie mailowe zawierające imię i nazwisko, wiek, numer telefonu + zdjęcie + link do video wizytówki + nagranie scenki proszę przesłać na: casting@unagimedia.pl

Główny bohater- Mężczyzna 20-40 lat, rola mówiona. Dobrze zbudowany. Mile widziane długie włosy, ale nie są konieczne.

PRZYJACIELE — DZIEWCZYNY Kobiety 20–25 lat — epizod. Różne typy urody. Mile widziane charakterystyczne cechy.

PRZYJACIELE — CHŁOPCY Mężczyźni 20–25 lat — epizod. Różne typy urody. Mile widziane charakterystyczne cechy.

STAWKI:

Od 5 do nawet 12 000 !!!

MATERIAŁY DO NAGRANIA:
WIZYTÓWKA + SCENKA

TIMING:

Zgłoszenia: do 27.05 do godz. 18:00 

Recall: 31.05 (niedziela)

Przymiarki: 3.06 i 5.06

Zdjęcia: 8.06/Warszawa

ZGŁOSZENIA:

Zgłoszenie mailowe zawierające imię i nazwisko, wiek, numer telefonu + zdjęcie + link do video wizytówki + nagranie scenki proszę przesłać na: casting@unagimedia.pl 

Link do castingu + opis scenek do nagrania:
https://unagimedia.pl/pl/casting060/

Tytuł: 050

Gotowy/a na energetyczny zastrzyk adrenaliny? Czekamy na Ciebie!

Sesja zdjęciowej dla klienta z branży eventowo - biznesowej! Poszukujemy dzieci:

🔹 Dziewczynki, 8-10 lat (z dokumentami do PIP)
https://casting-app.pl/apply/7dade83ff01142b4ae0a848c8c136b88

🔹 Chłopcy, 8-10 lat (z dokumentami do PIP)
https://casting-app.pl/apply/46ba1a3b82f24c3db879179f2203a199

📍 Termin zdjęć: 5 czerwca 
📍 Miejsce: Warszawa 
📍 Charakter zdjęć: dzienne

💰 Stawka: 300 zł za dzień zdjęciowy
(płatne gotówką po planie) 

📸 Wymagania:
Otwarte, śmiałe. Proszę o zdjęcia z uśmiechem, w ruchu, podczas zabawy. Link z wizytówką będzie dodatkowym atutem.

📩 Zgłoszenia prosimy wysyłać tylko przez linki zamieszczone pod nazwą roli. W razie dodatkowych pytań kontakt na: sky.zgloszenie@gmail.com

❗ Zgłoszenia na maila nie będą rozpatrywane.

Liczy się pasja do gotowania, osobowość pomysł na siebie. Wyślij swoje imię nazwisko wraz numerem telefonu na adres: zuzanna.kasterka@rochstar.tv កណធធធាវាាស្ស្ស Na uczestników czekają nagrody Czekamy na Was!'

items.text:
Casting male actor in the 40-50s age range- should be attractive, brown hair.
This is a lead role in the film with roughly 4-5 short scenes with very minimal dialogue. 

PLEASE NOTE: this is a student film, it is no pay but all actors will receive IMDb credits. 

Synopsis:

Unforgettable is a story of a woman’s desperate attempt to get pregnant and on her journey, gets an unexpected message from her beloved Grandfather from the afterlife.

And how the signs along the way of her journey, whispered to her, what gifts would be put in her path. A true story of one woman’s synchronicity and love. 

FILMING IN THE LOS ANGELES AREA. Actors MUST be local to LA or the San Fernando Valley!

If you are interested or know someone who might fit the role please DM me! Thank you!

Casting Call
Hathaleen: The Unexpected Journey to Palestine is a satirical black comedy drama PLAY about a British Zionist who unexpectedly travels to Palestine to prove to his ex-girlfriend that he isn't a Zionist, the reason for their breakup.

Currently casting for two roles:

Ahmed - a Palestinian villager (40s-60s)

The 90 minute play is about the Israel-Palestine conflict so requires actors who are comfortable dealing with that sensitive subject matter.

We will have a preview show on 10th July at The Source theatre before going to Camden Fringe 12-14th August and later Lambeth Fringe in October.

Looking for actors who are available for all performances. Rehearsals start ASAP in Stratford and will take place predominantly on Sundays.

Unfortunately this is an unpaid job offer but travel will be reimbursed and actors will receive the box split for their performances.

Please email u3008723@uel.ac.uk if you wish to apply
items.summary:
Casting Call
Hathaleen: The Unexpected Journey to Palestine is a satirical black comedy drama PLAY about a British Zionist who unexpectedly travels to Palestine to prove to his ex-girlfriend that he isn't a Zionist, the reason for their breakup.

Currently casting for two roles:

Ahmed - a Palestinian villager (40s-60s)

The 90 minute play is about the Israel-Palestine conflict so requires actors who are comfortable dealing with that sensitive subject matter.

We will have a preview show on 10th July at The Source theatre before going to Camden Fringe 12-14th August and later Lambeth Fringe in October.

Looking for actors who are available for all performances. Rehearsals start ASAP in Stratford and will take place predominantly on Sundays.

Unfortunately this is an unpaid job offer but travel will be reimbursed and actors will receive the box split for their performances.

Please email u3008723@uel.ac.uk if you wish to apply

🚨 CASTING CALL: Be Part of a Story That Changes Eternities! 🚨
Are you ready to use your acting talent for a greater, divine purpose?

Church House Productions is casting for our upcoming powerful episode of The Rapture Chronicles. This isn’t just another film project—it is a visual wake-up call and a ministry tool designed to shake hearts, reach lost souls for Jesus, and open eyes to the distractions and traps of this world that pull people away from God.

We are bringing to life a breathtaking, cinematic illustration of just how fast the Rapture could happen. We need passionate individuals to help us deliver this urgent message!

🎬 ROLES AVAILABLE (Non-Paid Opportunity):
3 Female Leads (Diverse Races)

1 Male Supporting Role

Background Extras (20–30 participants needed to bring the chaotic, pivotal moments to life!)
Incentives: IMDb Credit for speaking roles and End Credits for all participants.
Filming Dates: Detroit, MI. Metro Area in Mid-June 2026.

⚡ "Your role is already written. Will you heed the warning?"
If you have a heart for ministry, a passion for the screen, and want to help us plant seeds of faith that will last for eternity, we want to see your audition!

📩 HOW TO APPLY:
Don't wait—time is of the essence. Email us at churchouseproductions22@gmail.com today to receive full details for video auditions. Please specify the role you are interested in within the email subject line.
Let's use the arts to win souls for the Kingdom. Apply now!

items.title: It’s casting call time!

items.text:
Due to unforseen circumstances we are recasting for our tour of the children’s theatre show, “Tom Gates Live”, based on the popular book series by Liz Pichon.

The show is written and directed by Miranda Larson with songs and music by Barrie Bignold and is produced by Mark Thompson at MT Productions.

Production dates:

Tour dates June – Oct 2026. We are currently have 35 dates over this period. 

This production will be based around London so the successful candidate will need a base in London or the surrounding area. 

**Tom Gates (Male, 16 years - 23 years)**

Tom Gates is an easily distracted and creative 10-year-old boy who loves doodling, listening to music, and annoying his older sister, Delia.

We are looking for a musical theatre performer that can sing, perform slapstick and comedy, and can perform the role of a young boy. He needs to be strictly 5'10" tall or smaller. 

Within the show, there is basic singing, dancing and movement but nothing too technical.

 

The successful applicant will need to be comfortable assisting with the load ins/ outs and have a full UK drivers licence as they will be asked to assist driving the touring cast car.

Playing age:

16 years - 23 years

Height:

147 — 178 cm

Gender:

Male

Contract info:

Show day fee: £150

Travel day fee: £50

Subsistence: £20

Please send CV's & headshots to 

casting.mtproductions@gmail.com

items.text:
CASTING CALL — TV HOSTSNew Lifestyle & House Hunting Television Series
**LOS ANGELES BASED**

A major new lifestyle / house-hunting television series is now casting experienced on-camera hosts based in Los Angeles.

We are searching for a charismatic **male or female host**, aged approximately **30–45**, with a polished on-screen presence and strong television experience.

This is a professionally produced property and lifestyle series that will include:

* House hunting
* Property walkthroughs
* Lifestyle storytelling
* Some travel

We are looking for talent who can confidently connect with viewers while demonstrating genuine knowledge and passion for:

* Real estate
* Home design
* Architecture
* Lifestyle trends
* Luxury living

**IDEAL CANDIDATES WILL HAVE:**

* Proven experience hosting television programs or digital series
* Strong presenting and interviewing skills
* Professional, mature and glamorous on-camera presence
* Ability to improvise naturally on camera
* Excellent communication and storytelling ability
* Knowledge of property, interiors and home design
* Availability for one-day episode shoots

**PROJECT DETAILS:**

* Non-union
* Low per-episode hosting fee
* Each episode filmed in one shoot day
* Some travel may be required

**TO APPLY:**

Please email the following:

* Recent headshot/photos
* Resume or hosting credits
* Links to hosting reel or previous television work
* A short self-tape introducing yourself and explaining:
   * Your hosting experience
   * Your interest in property and home design
   * Why you would be perfect for this series

**SELF-TAPE GUIDELINES:**

Please keep your video under 2 minutes and film in a bright, quiet location.

If possible, include a short walkthrough of a stylish room, property, or home space while presenting to camera.

**SEND SUBMISSIONS TO:**

**Casting Director**

[info@abode-ent.com](mailto:info@abode-ent.com)  

Subject Line:

**HOUSE HUNTING HOST CASTING – YOUR NAME**

Only shortlisted applicants will be contacted.

topComments.text: Hi Gary, can yoy please tell Approximate shooting dates? I have hosting relevant experience but going out of LA for a month. Want to apply if the actual shooting gonna be starting from 2nd week of July or later.
Interested

items.text:
Hello all!

 

One of our actors had to leave our production due to recent health complications. We are currently looking for someone to replace the characters of Egeus/Philostrate. This role will be double cast as it's relatively small scene wise (roughly only in 2.5 scenes)

 

No specific gender or race requirements; would prefer a taller actor 5'8+ but not a dealbreaker if this doesn't apply. This is a community theatre volunteer role; actors and crew are NOT paid.

 

Location: Virginia Highlands, ATL 30306

 

**Current remaining rehearsal schedule **

**-T/Th 7-10pm**

**-Sat 10am-2pm**

**-Wed 6/3  7-10pm**

**-Fri 6/5 6-9pm**

 

**TECH **

**6/6-6/10 (NO Sunday rehearsal)**

 

**SHOWS **

**6/11-6/20**

**Thurs-Sat @8pm**

**Sun & 6/20 @2pm**

 

If interested or know someone who may be a good fit, please email our director/producer at the following

 

Info Renegade Theatre Co. <[info@renegadetheatreco.org](mailto:info@renegadetheatreco.org)>

 

Renegade Theatre <[renegadetheatreatl@gmail.com](mailto:renegadetheatreatl@gmail.com)>

topComments.text: Sweetie, they leave not for health reasons but because they had to work for “money”… gotta drop the “free” stuff when the bills gotta be paid 🤦🏻‍♀️

items.title: Hello all!

items.text:
🚨!!CASTING CALL!!🚨
🚨!!CASTING NOTICE!!🚨

Hello! My name is Reve Hriczko. I'm an independent filmmaker with my own independent film studio called Two Fold Films. We are currently casting for our upcoming 2028 horror film titled "Camp Red Lake." Below I've attached posters detailing all information you could possibly need for your audition as well as the audition form! Filming will be between May-August of 2027 in the Lehigh Valley, Pennsylvania. This is not paid work!! I'm very excited to work more on this project as it's been in the works for 2 years already.

Please share and audition! Feel free to reach out with any questions or concerns. You may dm me, comment on this post, or email Twofoldfilmsofficial@gmail.com

We also post a lot on our instagram @twofoldfilmsofficial and you can dm us there as well.

I look forward to seeing everyone's auditions!

https://forms.gle/kUouZ3eddEpaj59w5

attachments.ocrText: May be an image of text that says 'CAMP RED LAKE CASTING CALL NOW CASTING AGES 14-99 Self-Tape Auditions Deadline: July 24, 2026 June, 1985. A group of lifelong friends return to the caTp they'v loved since childhood Until a masked figure turns their summer fun into a nightmare.'

May be an image of text that says 'CAMP RED LAKE HOW TO AUDITION Step One: Read through the character descriptions listed on the audition form and in our bio! Step Two: Find a monologue you like that best shows off your abilities! Step Three: Film a self-tape! Step four: Fill out the aud audition form found in our bio and submit your tape! Step five: Wait to hear from us! :)'

May be an image of text that says 'Cap mpRed Red Lake NoW Casting Teen Roles: Mikey Harris (16) rebellious teen fresh out of juvie who's stuck at caTp with an ankle monitor. Megan Murphy (18) A strict, competitive overachiever and our protagonist's longtime rival. Zachary Windham (18)-A (18) loyal and kind-hearted jock Tiffany Hill (17) bubbly, Bowie-loving girly girl Jay Barnes -A laid-back caTp counselor everyone likes Amanda Smith (18)- Zach's flirty ex-girlfriend who loves creating tension and drama. Andy Zimmerman (16) nerdy and shy magician •Courtney Barclay (17)- An outgoing and kind new girl who people often get the wrong impression of'
May be an image of text

May be an image of text that says 'Camp Red Lake Now casting: Extras! Want to join in on the CaTp Red Lake casting fun, but don't want to read lines? We got you! Fill out section 2 of our audition form for extras only!'

topComments.text: I noticed that my recorded monologue is longer than the upload canb accommodate. Would it be acceptable to put a link to the monologue in the comment area?
Is it ok to submit my acting reel vs monologue?

items.title: 🚨!!CASTING CALL!!🚨

items.text:
LOGLINE

A wannabe mobster uses an app to relive — and fix — a past betrayal. But after multiple glitches, he finds himself stuck on app support hold and turns to the dark web for a solution to his clone chaos.

APPS is currently in post-production, and we’re looking for a Sound Mixer to help support the film’s final audio and sound mix. 🎧

Toronto-based preferred. This role will be remote.

This is a self-funded debut project with limited resources. A small honorarium will be provided, and you will receive credit for your work.

If interested, please send a short introduction along with your reel, portfolio, or samples of your work to:
STUDIO2425FILMS@GMAIL.COM

Thank you so much!

sharedPost.text:
Next Level Acting...Next Level You

Three days. One technique. No limits.

The Meisner Technique is one of the most powerful acting methods in the world — and this June, we’re bringing it to Central London.
Meisner Foundation Course

📅 8, 9 & 10 June
🕐 11am – 3pm
📍 Central London

Three days. Twelve hours. A completely new relationship with your craft.
DM us or email hello@meisnerlondon.com to secure your place.
#MeisnerTechnique #ActingLondon #LondonActors #ActingWorkshop #Meisner ActingTraining TheatreLondon

** Manchester actors — this one’s for you.**

A taster acting workshop using the Kogan Method is coming to St Peter’s Square on Saturday 30th May, 1:30–4:30pm.

Led by Paul Mushumani — personally trained by Sam Kogan, author of The Science of Acting, and mentioned in the book itself.

Perfect if you’re preparing for auditions or want to deepen your craft.

Only 12 places. £16.96

items.text:
Hey everyone, my name is Elias from 2 Liters Shady Films and I just released a new trailer for my indie horror feature film, Mocos. If you have a few minutes of your time, I’d really appreciate you checking it out.

I’m an independent filmmaker currently writing, editing, and filming the project myself, so every view, like, comment, and share truly goes a long way in supporting indie creators like me. 

I’m still actively filming and looking for anyone interested in getting involved with the feature film. No experience is necessary, and I have a ton of remote self-film scenes available that can be done right from the comfort of your own home using my detailed instructions.

If interested, feel free to message me directly or email me at mocosthemovie@gmail.com

Thank you again for the support and for helping independent horror continue to grow!

https://youtu.be/UcvK93KTtzY?si=_KVtQ_4leSnZgkw3

items.text:
CASTING FOR CHARACTERS!

---

CHASING SHADOWS (Chasing Shadows) - Pilot Episode

A crime/thriller online tv series that follows Astrid Clarke, an FBI agent torn between her family and her job when her brother joins a dangerous gang.

*LOCATION:*

Peterborough, UK

*CASTING REQUIREMENTS: ALL APPLICANTS HAVE TO BE 18+*

**Simon Clarke: **American accent. Visibly looks late twenties

**Classroom people/Park goers:** Anything goes. Open to all. We will try to fit in some improv discussions, but it will depend on what happens on the day with times.

*DATE & TIME:*

Current dates are **June 29th - July 1st**, but you would be needed for only one day, dependant on which character you are chosen for.

*PAYMENT & EXPENSES:*

**Unpaid, **as this is being funded personally. **Travel** will be **covered** **within** the **Peterborough** area **only**. Food is covered.

*CONTACT:*

Either DM me here, or email me at:

hannahlwalker02@hotmail.com

*OTHER IMPORTANT INFO:*

Simon’s character has a specific wardrobe, so Simon will need to be brought on board by June 10th at the VERY latest. June 1st ideally. Other characters by June 10th also, to allow script revision and prep time.

There are some T’s and C’s for Simon, but those can be discussed privately, such as character reappearances.

Thanks!

items.title: CASTING FOR CHARACTERS!

items.text:
🎭 CASTING CALL – ROMEO AND JULIET (Kathmandu Valley | Lambeth Fringe 2026) 🎭
We are casting local performers based in Nepal (Kathmandu Valley) for a bold new stage adaptation of Romeo and Juliet, heading to Lambeth Fringe 2026 (UK).

This is a contemporary, cross-cultural production that reimagines Shakespeare through movement, text, and grounded performance. We are looking for committed, expressive actors who are excited to work collaboratively and bring fresh energy to a classic story.

Roles available:

Romeo, Juliet, Mercutio, Tybalt, Friar Laurence, Nurse, and ensemble performers.

Location: Kathmandu Valley (rehearsals)

Festival: Lambeth Fringe 2026, London (UK tour)

Eligibility: Open to Nepal-based performers only

📩 To apply:

Send your CV, headshot, and a short self-tape (1–2 minutes introducing yourself and/or performing Shakespeare) to:

yuensunyeefilms@gmail.com

Subject line: R&J Casting – [Your Name] – Role Applying For

Shortlisted candidates will be contacted with audition details.

A timeless story, retold from Kathmandu to London.

Magnusispas@gmail.com oder dm :)

items.text:
🎭 FROM UNKNOWN TO NEARLY LEADING THE HUNGER GAMES TO STARRING ON NETFLIX
Hey there, my name is Freya Tingley. 

I’m an Australian actress working across international film and television, including series regular roles in two NETFLIX series and lead roles in six feature films. I starred in JERSEY BOYS directed by CLINT EASTWOOD and played Wendy Darling on the ABC hit series ONCE UPON A TIME.

I started out when I was 14 with no connections to the industry.

Just a few years later, I made it all the way down to the final few girls for Katniss Everdeen in The Hunger Games.

For a kid from Australia with no connections, that felt impossible.

By 17, I had signed with one of the biggest agents in Hollywood. At 18, I moved to LA and within three months booked a series regular role on a NETFLIX show.

Some people call that luck, but what they don’t see are the years of hard work, rejection, persistence, and the strategy behind every step I took to move forward.

Lately, I’ve been connecting with so many of you, and one thing keeps coming up again and again:

ACTORS FEELING STUCK AND NOT KNOWING WHAT TO DO TO CHANGE IT.

You train.

You get your materials together.

You’re told to “get an agent.”

But then…

You get an agent and nothing happens.

Or you don’t have one yet and don’t know how to get in the room.

That frustration is exactly why I created this.

A private 2-hour, 1:1 career mentorship session over Zoom.

We cover:

• The one skill actors really need to book work - and how to tell if you actually have it

• How to position yourself to attract the right representation

• What to focus on if you don’t yet have an agent

• What to do if your agent isn’t sending you auditions

• Why actors audition but still don’t book

• The materials you actually need (and what most actors get wrong)

• How to create more opportunities for yourself

• Plus much more

THE OUTCOME IS YOU WALK AWAY WITH NO MORE CONFUSION, NO MORE FEELING STUCK - BECAUSE YOU WILL HAVE CONFIDENCE IN KNOWING EXACTLY WHAT TO DO NEXT.

If you’re ready:

1. Comment COMMIT 

2. Send me a direct message me

items.text:
Moe Fields - the special bond between fathers and sons" is a Father's Day story for the ages. My father didn’t work on Wall St. My dad was a Plumber – a guy who was proud to work with his hands. I wrote this book to honor him--and ALL fathers; to celebrate the lessons they taught us.

The bloody image of the 1932 golden gloves competitor still inspires me. So, too, does his Navy WWII service. But one funny story from the book stands out.

The lesson in Lodi, NJ: I remember him towering over us, as kids. He was such a large guy. I remember the size of his hands swooping down to lift me to the sky.

But what I remember the most was his work ethic. I recall at 10-years old, when he took me on a job in Lodi New Jersey. It was a Cape Cod house. I remember it so well. We climbed the stairs.. I could smell the second-floor bathroom even as we walked down the hallway.

Dad walked into the bathroom and lifted the cover of the toilet. It was filled with paper and brown waste. He slowly turned to me, “Zach, stick your hands in the toilet and see what’s stopping it from flushing.”

The words hung in the air. I looked down at the toilet bowl and then up at my father’s 6’2” frame, 250 lbs., with those long arms that reached down past his waist. Those arms were connected to the largest set of hands I had ever seen.

Dad never gave instructions to his boys more than once. If we didn’t hear him or respond, the next experience was the back of his hand. The crack was so fast and furious; it would take several minutes before the pain registered in our brain. There was no sparing the rod. The boundary lines and expectations were clear.

I wasn’t about to challenge his instructions. I could see he was serious. I took off my coat and rolled up my shirt sleeves. I reached deep into the toilet bowl, with a determination I hoped he would be proud of. After several minutes fishing around for an answer I did not have, I pulled my hands out. The brown goo clung to my fingers. Once again, I looked up to dad for direction.

He paused for a minute to reinforce his message. He looked down at me. He then spoke slowly, “Zach, now you know the meaning of work! If you’re not afraid to get your hands dirty, you’ll be ok. Now, go wash your hands.”

The lesson from Lodi, New Jersey stayed with me. It’s a lesson I have used to shape my own ideas about life, work – and being a father.

Winner 2022 National Literary Award for Memoirs

Amazon best seller

Please repost and share with your favorite dad -- or son & daughter working at being a parent -- and wondering about their legacy.

See less

Please repost and share with your favorite dad -- or son & daughter working at being a parent -- and wondering about their legacy.

See less
items.title: Moe Fields - the special bond between fathers and sons" is a Father's Day story for the ages. My father didn’t work on Wall St. My dad was a Plumber – a guy who was proud to work with his hands. I wrote this book to honor him--and ALL fathers; to celebrate the lessons they taught us.

DIRECTOR 프렌시인라 PRCUCTION AKE FITLL DARECOOR EPA DATE VOTE मुख्यमंत्री होण्यासाठी आवश्यक जर त्वाच्याकडे मतदान कार्ड असेल तर तो पात्र आहे. दिग्दर्शक होण्यासाठी आवश्यक संवंधित विषयांचे शिक्षण आवश्यक आहे. डिप्लोमा पदवी किंवा प्रमाणपत्र आवश्यक. चित्रपट निमितीचे ज्ञान, कौशल्य आणि अनुभव आवश्यक. फक्त सख्याबळ तयार करावे लागते. त्यासाठी कोणतीही शैक्षणिक पात्रता आवश्यक नसते. सतत शिक्षण, अध्ययन आणि प्रशिक्षम आवश्यक. फिल्म इंडस्ट्रीमधील बोगस दिग्दर्शकांपासून सावध रहा. हांसाठी स्वतः सरकारने पुढे येऊन कठोर पावले उचलावी! रोहित प्रकाशशेठ पारख फिल्म मेकर 98500-49002 पारदर्शकता प्रामाणिकता जवाबदारी'

items.text:
**TELUS STORYHIVE SHORT FILM - CASTING CALL **

**UBCP ULB - PAID HONORARIUM **

**"A PART OF ME"**

***We are still seeking the roles below for our Storyhive short. Please submit ASAP!* **

**Director:** Tristan Miura

**Producers:** Allison Ham, Caylee Watrin 

**Category:** Indie Short Film - Produced by Telus Storyhive

**Casting Director:** Cathy Huynh 

**Union Status:** UBCP ULB 

**Compensation:** Paid Honorarium (see rates below). Food/crafty provided. Copy of film. IMDB credit.

**Filming Dates/Location:** July 3-6, 2026  / Vancouver, BC

**SUBMISSION INSTRUCTIONS:** Please email **ch17.film@gmail.com** with the subject heading [Your Name - Role Name] and include your headshot/photo, resume and demo reel (if applicable). 

**LOGLINE: **After suffering a double kidney failure during his semi-final baseball game, a Japanese-Canadian teenager begins to experience memories that aren’t his, and must uncover the truth behind his donor in order to heal. 

***OPEN TO NON-ACTORS - NO PREVIOUS ACTING EXPERIENCE REQUIRED***

**MILES - *****Character portrayed is Male, Mixed Japanese, 14-18***

Miles is the product of his environment. Growing up without a father meant growing up fast, but that doesn’t mean he doesn’t have the same struggles as any other teenager. Miles loves to be active, explore and learn, especially when it comes to baseball. He is always the first person to show up and the last to leave because being alone means sitting with himself. When he is suddenly stuck at home recovering from his kidney transplant, Miles must confront who he is and where he comes from. **LEAD ($100/day)**

**TAKEO - *****Character portrayed is Male, Japanese, 14-18***

Takeo is a first generation immigrant to Canada having moved from Japan 3 years before the War. Takeo loved baseball and dreamed of going pro. When he was interned Takeo would play baseball as an escape from the world, so when he notices Kiyoshi showing interest in his favourite sport he decides to take him under his wing. Takeo is loyal, showing love through honesty and kindness rather than false niceties. **SMALL SUPPORTING. *REAL BASEBALL EXPERIENCE AN ASSET ($50/day)**

**KIYOSHI - *****Character portrayed is Male, Japanese, 6-10***

Kiyoshi was only a child during the Second World War and his time in internment shifted his life forever. He loves baseball and looks up to all the players at Tashme. In spite of his incarceration, he still dreams of becoming a pro player. **SMALL SUPPORTING ($50/day)**

Casting call for non-speaking product video
Still trying to find the last talent for this shoot! I'm casting for a simple, non-speaking product video. Non-union.

Looking for: Ethnically ambiguous (tan/brown skin tone) male, age late 30's or 40's.

About the project:

The shoot is for a shaving cream product, meaning you will be shaving your face with a razor on camera.

Location: White Rock

Date: TBD - sometime within the next two weeks. We will work with your schedule to find the best fit.

Pay: $120 for approximately 3 hours.

To Apply:

Please email runestonepics@gmail.com with:

• Your availability

• Recent photos or headshots

Subject line: “shaving casting”

If you have already applied to my earlier casting call, there is no need to re-apply.

sharedPost.text:
Today’s show is done, and once again we leave the stage with grateful hearts. Every performance is more than just entertainment for us it’s the result of countless hours of training, sacrifices, teamwork, and passion. The energy from the crowd, the adrenaline under the lights, and the support we feel every time we step on stage make all the hard work worth it.

To everyone who watched and supported us today, thank you for sharing this moment with us. Your cheers and reactions give us the motivation to keep pushing beyond our limits and give our best every single performance.❤️✨🙏

#urbancrew #flyersofthesouth #performingartist #InternationalPerformers #fyp #reels

items.text:
We decided to attempt 10 Guinness World Records in one year.
This is the beginning of **Real Brothers**, our new unscripted YouTube series about two twin brothers, professional acrobats and performers, showing the real life behind the stage.

Not just a vlog.
We show the training, travel, backstage, pressure, failures, wins, brotherhood and the reality of chasing a huge goal while still working and performing.

For artists and athletes, there are real lessons from our process.
For everyone else, it is a look into a world most people never get to see.

**Real Brothers EP. 1 is now on YouTube.**
Watch here: [https://youtu.be/OEsQ3SYjj5o](https://youtu.be/OEsQ3SYjj5o)

sharedPost.text:
🎬 Do nowego serialu fabularnego, którego akcja dzieje się w czasach współczesnych, szukamy statystów w wieku 40-60 lat oraz statystów z autem 

📍 Zdjęcia realizujemy:
• 30 maja (sobota)
• 31 maja (niedziela)

📍 Lokalizacja:
ul. Borowa, Otwock

🕘 Plan dzienny rozpoczynający się około 6.00 rano

💰 Stawka:
120 zł netto za dzień zdjęciowy.
220 zl. netto statysta z autem 

❗Nie jest wymagana dyspozycyjność na oba dni — można zgłosić się tylko na 30 lub tylko na 31 maja.

📩 Zgłoszenia prosimy wysyłać na adres:
dorota.kamedstudio@gmail.com

W zgłoszeniu należy podać:
• imię i nazwisko
• numer telefonu
• wiek
• dyspozycyjność (30 i/lub 31 maja)
• dwa aktualne zdjęcia:
– portret
– sylwetka
- osoby zgłaszające na plan auto dodatkowo zdjęcie samochodu i marka

📌 W temacie maila prosimy wpisać:
OTWOCK

Wyborów dokonuje reżyser na podstawie przesłanych zdjęć.
Będziemy kontaktować się z wybranymi osobami.

Zapraszamy! 🎥

sharedPost.text:
🎤 Kostenlos singen lernen – live & online!
Du möchtest singen lernen – kostenlos, von zuhause und mit echter Gesangslehrerin live dabei? ✨
 
Am 28. Mai um 18:30 Uhr findet mein kostenloses Gesangs-Webinar statt – für Anfänger, Fortgeschrittene und alle, die ihre Stimme endlich entfalten wollen. Wir machen gemeinsam Übungen, du kannst live Fragen stellen – und es kostet dich gar nichts. 🎶
 
👉 Link in der Bio – oder direkt hier:
singasong-behappy.de/gesangs-webinar-mit-bernadette-kube/
 
#SingenLernen #GesangsWebinar #KostenlosSingen #Gesangsunterricht #SingASongBeHappy Stimmbildung

sharedPost.text:
𝗡𝗲𝘄 𝗮𝘁 𝗕𝗼𝗱𝘆𝗺𝗶𝗻𝗱 𝗧𝗵𝗲𝗿𝗮𝗽𝘆 𝗕𝗲𝗿𝗹𝗶𝗻: Belly Massage for Women & FLINTA*
​
The belly is one of the most emotionally and physically charged areas of the body — connected to stress, digestion, menstruation, hormones, emotions, vulnerability, and nervous system regulation.
​
Yet it’s also an area many people disconnect from, tense, hide, or ignore.
​
This treatment focuses exactly there: through integrative bodywork, belly massage, and nervous system-focused touch.
​
A powerful journey back to your center.
​
📍 In Berlin-Kreuzberg
​
→ 𝗟𝗲𝗮𝗿𝗻 𝗺𝗼𝗿𝗲:
https://www.bodymindtherapy.de/en/integrative-bodywork-frauen-in-berlin
.
.
.
​
#bellymassage #abdominalmassage #womensbodywork #flintabodywork #massageberlin #bodyworkberlin #berlinkreuzberg #nervoussystemregulation
